original_prompt: Enhance view.triggers.js with JSON formatting and validation for webhook headers and payloads. Add validation UI, auto-format on blur, and block saving on invalid JSON.
rephrased_goal: Add strict JSON integrity to the automation engine triggers. Implement formatJSONString and validateJSON utilities, add real-time validation warnings to the editor UI, and enforce pretty-printing and validation before saving trigger records.

subtasks_required: 2.1 Find where headers/payload textareas are defined in stringComponent

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update view.triggers.js with JSON logic
subtasks_required: 3.1 Replace entire file with provided updated code
tasks.analogy_reference: painting new masterwork with JSON shield
tasks.testing_criteria: File matches provided code specifically including validation spans and listeners.

subtasks_required: Update wiki with JSON validation facts
tasks.testing_criteria: Application builds and JSON validation functional.
